// ==== ComponentParameterInfo.g.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace CdCSharp.BlazorUI;

/// <summary>Describes a single Blazor component parameter.</summary>
public sealed record ComponentParameterInfo(
    string  ParameterName,
    string  ParameterType,
    string? ParameterDefault,
    string? ParameterDescription);

// ==== GenerateComponentInfoAttribute.g.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
namespace CdCSharp.BlazorUI;

/// <summary>
/// Marks a Blazor component for automatic documentation generation.
/// Add <c>@attribute [GenerateComponentInfo]</c> to the .razor file,
/// or <c>[GenerateComponentInfo]</c> to a .cs component class.
/// </summary>
[System.AttributeUsage(System.AttributeTargets.Class,
    AllowMultiple = false, Inherited = false)]
public sealed class GenerateComponentInfoAttribute : System.Attribute { }

// ==== MyComponentComponentInfo.g.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using CdCSharp.BlazorUI;

namespace TestNs;

/// <summary>Auto-generated parameter docs for <see cref="MyComponent"/>.</summary>
public static partial class MyComponentComponentInfo
{
    public static readonly ComponentParameterInfo[] Parameters =
    [
        new(
            ParameterName:        "Text",
            ParameterType:        "string?",
            ParameterDefault:     null,
            ParameterDescription: "Visible label."
        ),
        new(
            ParameterName:        "Disabled",
            ParameterType:        "bool",
            ParameterDefault:     "false",
            ParameterDescription: "Disables interaction."
        ),
        new(
            ParameterName:        "Count",
            ParameterType:        "int",
            ParameterDefault:     "42",
            ParameterDescription: null
        ),
    ];
}
